title: Senior Data Analyst
description: We are seeking an experienced Business Intelligence Analyst with at least 5 years of professional expertise in data analysis, reporting, and business intelligence. The ideal candidate will be highly collaborative, detail-oriented, and skilled at working across diverse teams and time zones. This role requires strong technical proficiency in Power BI, Snowflake, SQL, and Jira, as well as the ability to translate complex data into actionable insights that drive strategic decision-making.JOB SPECIFI
